title: pouteria dictyoneura subsp. typica
intro: Pouteria dictyoneura subsp. typica, also known as the camansi or yam bean, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Sapotaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The camansi plant is valued for its health benefits, which include lowering blood sugar levels, reducing cholesterol levels, and providing protection against certain diseases. It is often prepared as a herbal supplement or used in traditional medicine preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions.
